title: Araghchi may go to Muscat then Moscow after Islamabad — Iranian official
snippet: An Iranian diplomatic official says FM Araghchi may travel from Islamabad to Muscat (Oman) and then Moscow after consultations with Pakistan. The multi-stop tour reflects Iran's effort to coordinate positions with allies and mediators before any potential engagement with US. Oman has historically facilitated back-channel Iran-US communication.
tag_reason: New itinerary details for Araghchi — Muscat and Moscow legs not previously reported. Signals Iran diplomatic choreography and coalition-building.
